since_last: 37% of 101 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.33%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -1.00% · Gold +1.38% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 37% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.33%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.33%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +14.23%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +14.23%, DELL +2.39%, CCJ +2.29%, CHKP +2.15%, HPE +2.05%. Laggards: GEV -6.86%, SKHY -6.74%, MU -4.48%, LRCX -4.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.19% at $123.77
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
